3027136.title: SpongeBob
3027136.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3027226.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
3027226.description: Felicity pulls a legendary talking sword named "Excali-Burt" from a stone and is rewarded with her own magical castle. // Rudy begs Mighty Meow and Super Lucha to give him a shot at being their sidekick.

3027282.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
3027282.description: Felicity calls a magic, but mischievous, pixie to make her malts delicious. // Felicity's new pen has a way with words, making them a reality.

3027375.title: Dorg van Dango
3027375.description: Yooki is caught in one of Mr. Munch's ghost traps, Dorg and the gang must rescue her before she's revealed on TV and sent back to Area 52! // A video game from RD's planet infects every machine in Normill, Dorg and the gang must stop the chaos!

3027669.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3027669.description: Marlene is dying to go see a concert in the park. But, every time she leaves the zoo she becomes a feral monster! // Ma, an empty-nested mother possum, takes up residence in the Penguins Lair after they destroy her home.

3027710.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3027710.description: It's off to the races when Skipper agrees to give a day off from hard training to the first penguin who can bring him a kipper. // The penguins are determined to make opening day of their favorite action star's blockbuster movie!

3027781.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3027781.description: The Turtles must face off against a new enemy, The Rat King, who threatens not only to take control of the city, but Splinter's mind as well.

3027828.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3027828.description: The Turtles get their first taste of high school when April's school project draws Kraang attention.

3027877.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3027877.description: At a park clean up, Timmy wishes the animals would pick up after themselves. The animals unite and launch an all-out attack on Timmy. // Timmy helps his mom make a viral video. Crocker sees it and thinks Mom is a magical Breakfast Troll.

3028185.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3028185.description: Timmy, his dad, and fairies get stuck in a board game created by Cosmo.

3028232.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3028232.description: When Dave discovers he didn't graduate from high school, he finds himself in school with Alvin. Talk about the Odd Couple.

3028259.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3028259.description: Simon has found a new best friend, Jamie. He's smart, funny, and shares Simon's love of Science. But when Jamie realizes that Alvin is the more popular brother, he ditches Simon to get in with the cool crowd. Can the brothers survive this new friend?

3028282.title: SpongeBob
3028282.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3028333.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3028641.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3092947.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3093021.title: SpongeBob
3093021.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3093093.title: SpongeBob
3093093.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3093891.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3093891.description: When Theodore thinks he's a real superhero, Alvin and Simon have a tough time convincing him to leave the crime fighting to the professionals.

3093923.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3093923.description: Brittany is humiliated by Jeanette's lack of style. That is, until Jeanette is proclaimed a fashion trendsetter by Brittany's style icon. Now Brittany wants to prove she's more stylish than her sister.

3093956.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3093956.description: Simon is too embarrassed to kiss his co-star in the school play. So in a moment of desperation, he agrees to allow Alvin to switch identities.

3093996.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3093996.description: Every year, Private is chosen as the cover animal for the zoo brochure. But this year the photographer discovers the adorable Mort. / A puffin rival from Skipper's past shows up. Skipper doesn't trust his claims that he's here to bury the hatchet.

3094830.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3094830.description: When the penguins discover Skipper's idol, Rockgut, they fall under his paranoid spell. // Kowalski threatens to tear the space/time continuum with his time machine. He sends his future self to stop his present self from completing the time machine.

3094886.title: The Loud House
3094886.description: When the lights go out in the Loud House, the kids entertain themselves by taking turns telling parts of a story. // Lucy and the Morticians' Club try to thwart plans for a school field trip to the beach.

3094971.title: The Loud House
3094971.description: The siblings turn to Lisa's genius to help them land a spot on 'Double Dare.' // After secretly reading Luna's diary, Leni and Lincoln become worried about the exploits their sister writes about.

3032372.title: Hier is Pony
3032372.description: In an effort to avoid paying for parking, the whole family must try and keep a visit to the mall to less than 10 minutes. // Annie worries that their friend Clara is avoiding her and Pony.
